nasb.text: “Go away from here and turn eastward, and hide yourself by the brook Cherith, which is east of the Jordan.

esv.text: “Depart from here and turn eastward and hide yourself by the brook Cherith, which is east of the Jordan.

cnv.text: “你離開這裡，向東方去，躲藏在約旦河東面的基立溪旁。

ccb.text: “你离开这里，往东去，到约旦河以东的基立溪旁躲起来。
